rationale: Both reviews identify the same two real documentation issues (missing docstring on `includeRight_apply`, overclaiming Hopf structure in `includeRight`'s docstring) confirmed against the diff. Review 2 adds a note that `includeRight_apply` is a `rfl`-unfolding of questionable simp value, but this is a minor elaboration on an already-shared finding, not a decisive difference in the resulting PR quality.
